=== bd1984-05-23_info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Los Angeles, California
23 May 1984
Rehearsal before tour

ONE CD --- 78:08.44
01. [03:57.70] Maggie's Farm
02. [03:36.23] All Along The Watchtower
03. [04:14.71] Just Like A Woman
04. [03:37.09] When You Gonna Wake Up
05. [03:28.19] Shelter From The Storm
06. [02:46.50] Watered Down Love
07. [04:22.04] Masters Of War
08. [04:04.22] Jokerman
09. [01:54.05] Simple Twist Of Fate
10. [03:29.65] Simple Twist Of Fate
11. [04:18.71] Man Of Peace
12. [03:28.18] I And I
13. [00:34.70] It's All Over Now, Baby Blue
14. [03:46.37] Ballad Of A Thin Man
15. [03:59.74] Heart Of Mine
16. [02:04.27] Highway 61 Revisited / I See You Around And Around (?)
17. [03:30.20] Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat
18. [01:47.09] Unidentified Instrumental
19. [04:55.63] It's All Over Now, Baby Blue
20. [02:05.71] Almost Done
21. [05:04.69] Always On My Mind
22. [05:35.71] Every Grain Of Sand
23. [01:24.06] Girl From The North Country

Bob Dylan (vocal, guitar, harmonica), 
Mick Taylor (guitar), 
Ian McLagan (keyboards), 
Gregg Sutton (bass), 
Colin Allen (drums)

I think I downloaded this recording in 2005. I have not changed anything except including checksum files.
I would assume that this is the same as recording as is archived as LB-26. These are the notes that came with the file set as I received it:
--------

Note that, while the number of tracks here is different from the number of songs listed in Dundas, Bjorner, etc, the recording is apparently complete-as-circulating.  Reported versions of this recording are timed at 77-78 minutes, and this download times to just over 78 minutes.  

The recording is sourced from a more-or-less continuous analaog recording, and the breakdown into individual tracks for a CDR is in several ways arbitrary, especially with regard to multiple, successive stabs at the same song. This 23-track breakdown is no less appropriate/"authentic" than a breakdown which matches the posted listings.

monicasdud
===================
===================
===================
=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Los Angeles, California
23 May 1984
Rehearsal before tour

1.Maggie's Farm
2.All Along The Watchtower
3.Just Like A Woman
4.When You Gonna Wake Up
5.Shelter From The Storm
6.Watered Down Love
7.Masters Of War
8.Jokerman
9.Simple Twist Of Fate
10.Simple Twist Of Fate
11.Man Of Peace
12.I And I
13.It's All Over Now, Baby Blue
14.Ballad Of A Thin Man
15.Heart Of Mine
16.Highway 61 Revisited / I See You Around And Around (?)
17.Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat
18.Unidentified Instrumental
19.It's All Over Now, Baby Blue
20.Almost Done
21.Always On My Mind
22.Every Grain Of Sand
23.Girl From The North Country

Bob Dylan (vocal, guitar, harmonica), 
Mick Taylor (guitar), 
Ian McLagan (keyboards), 
Gregg Sutton (bass), 
Colin Allen (drums)

Note that, while the number of tracks here is different from the number of songs listed in Dundas, Bjorner, etc, the recording is apparently complete-as-circulating.  Reported versions of this recording are timed at 77-78 minutes, and this download times to just over 78 minutes.  

The recording is sourced from a more-or-less continuous analaog recording, and the breakdown into individual tracks for a CDR is in several ways arbitrary, especially with regard to multiple, successive stabs at the same song. This 23-track breakdown is no less appropriate/"authentic" than a breakdown which matches the posted listings.

monicasdud
===================
